title: Theme: House and Furniture
description: Vocabulary for describing parts of the house and daily living objects.

sentences.spanish: El señor lava el sofá con cuidado.
sentences.english: The man washes the sofa with care.

sentences.spanish: Mi madre ordena la cocina para los invitados.

sentences.spanish: Yo ordeno la cocina todos los sábados.
